border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="WZm4bcWPoafVi_KXKrZm"> <mxGraphModel dx="6147" dy="6057" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="122.07" y="26940" width="1007.93" height="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;glass=0;arcSize=4;strokeColor=#FF6666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="153.5" y="27010" width="947.3" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">useradd username</font><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">(Basic Creation)</font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;shadow=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="181.3" y="27070" width="218.7" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">useradd -m username</font><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">(with home directory)</font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;shadow=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="510.57" y="27070" width="238.86" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">passwd username</font><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">(Set Password)</font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;shadow=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="860" y="27070" width="216.3" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="<font style="font-size: 20px;" face="Verdana"><b>User Creation</b></font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="538.3" y="27020" width="180" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;glass=0;arcSize=4;strokeColor=#00994D;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="154.65" y="27190" width="947.3" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">usermod -d /path username</font><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">(Change home directory)</font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="182.45" y="27250" width="267.55" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">usermod -s /bin/bash username</span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">(Change Shell)</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="480.01" y="27250" width="299.99" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">usermod -aG group username</span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">(Add to Group)</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="810" y="27250" width="267.45" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="<font style="font-size: 20px;" face="Verdana"><b>User Modification</b></font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="520.76" y="27200" width="210.55" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;glass=0;arcSize=4;strokeColor=#66B2FF;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="155.8" y="27370" width="947.3" height="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">userdel -r username</span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">(Delete username &amp; home)</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="183.6" y="27430" width="256.4" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" value="<font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">passwd -l username</span></font><div><font face="Verdana"><span style="font-size: 16px;">(Lock Account)</span></font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="534.64" y="27430" width="221.16" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="16" value="<font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">passwd -u username</font><div><font style="font-size: 16px;" face="Verdana">(Unlock Account)</font></div>" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeWidth=2;arcSize=10;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="850" y="27430" width="228.6" height="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" value="<font style="font-size: 20px;" face="Verdana"><b>Account Management</b></font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="491.70000000000005" y="27380" width="268.67" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="18" value="<font style="font-size: 25px;" face="Verdana"><b style="">User Management in Linux</b></font>" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="152" y="26960" width="388.22" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
